payload.text: Você conhece todos os metodos de operação gráfica e ninguém é mais acertivo que você, crie um aplicativo para seu cel android que possua seus olhos e mostra os gatilhos de entrada. Receba a cada 90 segundos uma alerta avisando a direção do preço

**Developing the Interface**

I am now focusing on the visual interface. I envision "Gemini eyes" to provide the primary trading signals. My aim is a high-tech, assertive tone, with clear, 90-second automated price direction alerts. I am thinking it should be both informative and somewhat futuristic.

entries.description: App configuration including name, description and required permissions.
Main HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and necessary fonts.
React application entry point using React 18 createRoot API.
Global type definitions for the trading application.
Service to interact with Gemini API for generating market predictions and signals.
Futuristic animated eyes representing the Gemini Vision.
Simulated market chart visualization using Recharts.
Main application logic, state management, and 90-second update loop.
